title: Smoky Kangaroo Stew
description: A hearty Australian-inspired stew made with tender kangaroo meat, smoky flavors, and a rich, savory broth.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add bacon and cook until crispy. Remove bacon and set aside.
Add kangaroo steak and cook until browned on all sides. Remove kangaroo and set aside with bacon.
Add onion and garlic to the pot and cook until softened.
Add carrots and potatoes to the pot and cook for 5 minutes.
Add beef broth, tomato paste, smoked paprika, and browned kangaroo back to the pot.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 1.5 hours, or until kangaroo is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with crispy bacon and fresh parsley.
